post.subject: Please answer...
post.body: What do you do on the internet??

comments.body: On The Internet..I Talk To People On Msn..Whilst Listening To Music..And I Go On Websites..I Go Through My Faves Seeing If Anything Is Updated.If No One Is On Or Nothing Is Updated I Go Offline..Cause I Get Bored And Theres No Point Sitting Here If Im Bored.So Yep Thats What I Do..Arent I Exciting..Go Me!
comments.author: messypup
